skills.name: devo-jira
skills.description: Query and manage Jira and Confluence using Atlassian REST APIs. Jira: Search issues via JQL, manage issues/comments/projects. Confluence: Browse spaces, search pages with CQL, get page content, track documentation updates. On-Call Report Generator: Automated report generation from CSV alert data with P1/P2/False Positive categorization. Both use shared API token authentication.
prompts: Search Jira issues using JQL queries and get issue details
Create/update Jira issues, add comments, manage workflow transitions
Get my assigned Jira issues and project details
Browse Confluence spaces and search pages using CQL
Get Confluence page content by ID or search by title
Find Confluence pages by label or space
Search both Jira and Confluence for related documentation
Generate on-call report from CSV alert data with ticket categorization and duration calculation
